response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack/web engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang credentials, but the profile diverges from nearly every core requirement of this role. There is no Japanese language proficiency (a hard requirement at native level), no Linux kernel modification experience, no L2/L3 switch or network-security background (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), and only brief C/C++ exposure from a six-month role in 2014-2015. The embedded systems mention is superficial relative to the firmware depth this position demands.
strengths: Long, continuous software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Demonstrated low-latency systems work (async I/O, fibers, high-throughput services) at Dunnhumby
Strong testing culture and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open-source test tooling)
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — the role requires native-level Japanese
Minimal C/UNIX experience and no Linux kernel or embedded switch-firmware background
No exposure to required security/networking technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, NETCONF, switch chips)

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking/security or kernel experience
Solid general seniority and systems programming aptitude
